title: OUOZZZ Highland Cow Teddy – 14.5" Mother with 4 Baby Plushies Inside – Soft Plush Highland Cow Gifts for Boys & Girls, Birthday, Christmas & Easter Present
features: Soft & Cuddly Highland Cow Teddy – Made from ultra-soft, skin-friendly plush fabric, this charming mother cow with four baby calves is perfect for bedtime hugs and everyday comfort
Interactive & Imaginative Play – Babies can be stored inside the mother’s tummy, encouraging storytelling, role-play adventures, and creative learning for kids
Safe & Tested for Children – Crafted from high-quality, non-toxic materials and tested to UKCA & EN71 safety standards. Suitable for children aged 3+, with no hard parts for safe play
Perfect Highland Cow Gifts – A unique stuffed animal gift for birthdays, Christmas, Easter, and special occasions. Loved by boys, girls, and animal lovers of all ages
Cute Highland Cow Plush Décor – More than just a toy! This adorable mother and baby plush set makes a lovely highland cow plush decoration for nurseries, bedrooms, or themed collections
